core.default_prompt_env: You are a helpful AI assistant.

auth.auth_not_authorized: ❌ You are not authorized to use this bot.
auth.setup_guide: 🤖 Welcome to NexusTG! This bot is the core of your digital twin. It uses your account and neural networks to automate communication. 📖 Quick Guide: 1. Visit my.telegram.org 2. Go to API development tools 3. Create an application and copy your API_ID and API_HASH. Click the button when you are ready!
auth.setup_ask_api_id:
✅ API ID Waiting for your API_ID (digits only):
You can get it at my.telegram.org. Message will be deleted.
auth.setup_ask_api_hash:
✅ API Hash Waiting for your API_HASH (32 characters):
Message will be deleted.
auth.setup_ask_api_keys:
✅ Gemini API Keys Waiting for Gemini API Keys (comma-separated):
Message will be deleted.
auth.setup_api_id_error: ❌ Error! API_ID must contain digits only. Please try again:
auth.setup_api_hash_error: ❌ API_HASH Error! Hash must be exactly 32 alphanumeric characters. Please check and re-enter:
auth.setup_completed: 🎉 Setup completed! You can now log in to the userbot account.
auth.setup_configured_not_logged: ✅ System configured, but userbot is offline.
auth.auth_enter_phone:
✅ Authorization Waiting for phone number (e.g., +1234567890):
Message will be deleted.
auth.auth_code_sent: ✉️ Code sent! Use the keypad below to enter it:
auth.auth_success_restart: ✅ Success! Userbot is running. Ready to use!
auth.auth_2fa_required:
✅ Cloud Password Waiting for your account's 2FA password:
Message will be hidden for security reasons.

settings.ask_new_keys:
✅ Gemini API Keys Current keys: ******** (hidden) Waiting for new Gemini keys (comma-separated):
Message will be deleted.
settings.ask_new_models:
✅ Gemini Models Current models: {current_models} Waiting for new AI models (comma-separated):
Message will be deleted.
settings.ask_new_tz:
✅ Timezone Current timezone: {current_tz} Waiting for new timezone (e.g., Europe/London):
Format: Continent/City. Message will be deleted.
settings.tz_error: ❌ Error! Invalid timezone format. Make sure to use Continent/City (e.g., Europe/Minsk).
settings.test_running: ⏳ Running configuration test... This may take a while.
settings.menu_main_title:
🤖 Main Dashboard Server time: {time} ({tz})
Select a system section or go to the chat list for local module configuration.
settings.menu_settings_title:
⚙️ System Settings Manage core parameters, API keys, and connected modules.
Here you can configure neural networks, change timezone, or reset the system.
settings.ask_full_reset: ⚠️ WARNING! SYSTEM RESET Are you sure you want to perform a full reset? This action is irreversible. The following will be permanently deleted: • Your admin status • API keys and model settings • Current Telegram session (Userbot) You will have to set up the system from scratch.
settings.menu_chats_list:
💬 Chat List
Select a dialogue for individual AI settings:
settings.yt_upload_prompt:
✅ YouTube Cookies Upload Waiting for youtube.com_cookies.txt file:
Send it as a document (.txt). Message will be deleted after upload.
settings.yt_invalid_format: ⚠️ Invalid format! Please send a text file with .txt extension.
settings.yt_cookies_updated:
✅ Cookies successfully updated!
The bot should now be able to bypass captchas for subtitle parsing.

logs.log_admin_claimed: Admin rights claimed by user ID: {admin_id}
logs.log_no_api_keys: Gemini API keys not found in DB!
logs.err_no_api_keys: ❌ API keys not configured. Please complete setup.
logs.prompt_transcribe: Provide an accurate transcription of this media.

voice_transcriber.menu_v_title:
🎙 Voice to Text
This module automatically or via command converts voice messages and video notes to text using Gemini AI.
voice_transcriber.menu_v_chat_title:
🎙 Chat Settings Dialogue: {chat_id}
Override global settings for this specific contact:
voice_transcriber.v_enter_command:
✅ Voice to Text Trigger Current command: {cmd} Waiting for new command (e.g., .text):
Message will be deleted.
voice_transcriber.v_summary_prompt: Provide a very brief summary (main point in 1-3 sentences) of this text:

fake_activity.fake_menu_title:
🎭 Fake Activity
Select the status type to be displayed to the contact in this chat. The bot will simulate this action for the specified duration.
fake_activity.fake_enter_duration:
✅ Fake Activity Duration Waiting for number of minutes (e.g., 5 or 0.5):
Status will automatically disappear after the time expires. Message will be deleted.
fake_activity.fake_started:
✅ Started! Activity is active for {minutes} min.
You can return to the chat menu; the status will continue running in the background.

shop_list.menu_title:
🛒 Shopping List
The bot automatically turns plain text or chat messages into convenient checklists. You can add items by replying to an existing list.
shop_list.prompt_reset_alert: System prompt has been reset to factory defaults.
shop_list.enter_command:
✅ Shopping List Command Current trigger: {cmd} Waiting for new command (e.g., .buy):
Message will be deleted.
shop_list.enter_chats:
✅ Auto-chats for parsing Current auto-chats: {chats} Waiting for chat IDs (comma-separated):
Format: chat_id:topic_id or just chat_id. Send 'reset' to clear. Message will be deleted.
shop_list.chats_updated: ✅ List of chats for auto-parsing updated!
shop_list.empty_list: ❌ Error! Failed to extract items from this message.
shop_list.default_ai_prompt: You are a smart shopping list sorter. Extract items from user text, combine with current list if provided, sort logically. RETURN ONLY VALID JSON ARRAY OF STRINGS. 1. NO category names. 2. Item name + quantity + emoji ONLY. 3. Ignore filler words. 4. Keep user language (usually Russian).

ai_command.menu_ai_cmd_title:
🧠 Manual AI Call
This module analyzes the context of the last 30 messages and attached files.
📝 Prompt: {prompt}
ai_command.ai_cmd_enter_cmd:
✅ Manual AI Command Current trigger: {cmd} Waiting for new command (e.g., .ai):
Message will be deleted.
ai_command.ai_cmd_enter_prompt:
✅ Manual AI Prompt Current system prompt: 
{prompt}
Waiting for new system prompt:
Defines AI behavior during manual calls. Message will be deleted.
ai_command.ai_media_desc_prompt: Describe VERY BRIEFLY (max 1-2 sentences) what is in the photo/video. Just the essence, no filler.

message_saver.menu_saver_title:
🕵️ Spy-Module
Hidden saving of deleted and edited messages, as well as media with a timer (TTL) into a secret dump chat.
message_saver.saver_dump_instruction: 🔔 Log Chat Setup This module requires a Supergroup with Topics enabled. 📖 Choose one of the options: 1. Click «Create Automatically» (Userbot will do everything). 2. Select an existing group from the list (Bot will grant itself rights). 3. Enter ID manually (If you configured the group with bot @{bot_username}).
message_saver.saver_auto_creating:
⏳ Automatic setup...
This will take a few seconds. Creating a new group, adding the bot, granting admin rights, and enabling topics...
message_saver.saver_auto_error:
❌ Creation error: {e}
The userbot might have restrictions on creating groups. Try selecting an existing group or entering ID manually.
message_saver.saver_select_dump_title:
Group Selection
Below are the latest supergroups your userbot is in. Selecting one will attempt to join and grant admin rights:
message_saver.saver_ask_dump:
✅ Log Chat (Dump) Waiting for group/channel ID (e.g., -100123...):
Bot must be an admin there. Ensure ID starts with -100. Message will be deleted.
message_saver.saver_ask_targets:
✅ Target Chats (Saver) Waiting for chat IDs (comma-separated):
Or send 'reset' to parse all dialogues. Message will be deleted.
message_saver.saver_ask_bl:
✅ Blacklist (Saver) Waiting for user IDs (comma-separated):
Or send 'reset' to clear the blacklist. Message will be deleted.
message_saver.saver_ask_delay:
✅ Sending Delay (Saver) Waiting for Min and Max minutes (e.g., 1 5):
Messages will be sent to the dump with a random delay to prevent flooding. Message will be deleted.
message_saver.saver_ask_limits:
✅ Caching Limits (Saver) Waiting for limits in MB (RegularMedia and TTLMedia separated by space, e.g., 20 50):
Files exceeding these limits will not be saved. Message will be deleted.
message_saver.log_set_dump_toggle_forum_error: Error enabling topics in existing group: {e}

ai_twin.ai_human_g_text: 🧠 Global 'Humanization' Settings Configure realistic human simulation parameters.
ai_twin.ai_g_settings_text: ⚙️ General AI Settings ⏱ Timings & Delays ├ 🌙 Sleep Mode: {sleep_text} ├ ⌨️ Typing Speed: {typing} s/char ├ ⏳ Delay BEFORE reading: {db_min} - {db_max} s └ 🚀 Delay AFTER reading: {da_min} - {da_max} s 🧠 Global Prompt Preview: {prompt}...
ai_twin.ai_g_reaction_request:
✅ Custom AI Reaction Waiting for one emoji (Regular or Premium):
The bot will use this emoji when the [LIKE] tag is generated. Message will be deleted.
ai_twin.ai_ignore_request:
✅ Ignore Chance Waiting for number (0-100):
Probability (percent) to ignore a message if it contains no question. To reset to global, send 'reset'. Message will be deleted.
ai_twin.ai_ignore_error: ❌ Error. Enter a number between 0 and 100.
ai_twin.ai_h_cfg_smart_req:
✅ Smart Read Waiting for seconds multiplier (e.g., 0.05 or 0.1):
Specify how many seconds it takes to read 1 character. To reset, send 'reset'. Message will be deleted.
ai_twin.ai_h_cfg_typing_req:
✅ Typing Simulation Waiting for 4 numbers in seconds (e.g., 1.5 3.5 0.5 2.0):
Format: MinType MaxType MinPause MaxPause. To reset, send 'reset'. Message will be deleted.
ai_twin.ai_g_prompt_error_format: ❌ Please send text or a .txt file!
ai_twin.ai_g_delays_request:
✅ Global Delays Waiting for 4 numbers in seconds (e.g., 60 180 5 15):
Format: MinBefore MaxBefore MinAfter MaxAfter. Message will be deleted.
ai_twin.ai_g_typing_request:
✅ Base Typing Speed Waiting for speed coefficient (e.g., 0.08 or 0.1):
Seconds per character. Message will be deleted.
ai_twin.ai_sleep_request:
✅ Sleep Mode Server Time: {time} Waiting for sleep interval (e.g., 23:30 08:00):
The AI will completely ignore messages during this time. To disable, send 'off'. Message will be deleted.
ai_twin.ai_g_search_applied_alert: Global search status applied to all chats!
ai_twin.ai_c_search_changed_alert: Search status for this chat changed!
ai_twin.ai_c_delays_request:
✅ Chat Delays Waiting for 4 numbers in seconds (e.g., 60 180 5 15):
Format: MinBefore MaxBefore MinAfter MaxAfter. Send 'reset' for global. Message will be deleted.
ai_twin.ai_link_rule: [SYSTEM RULE]: External link detected. GOOGLE SEARCH IS AVAILABLE. You MUST use search tool.
ai_twin.ai_prompt_rule_search: [IMPORTANT RULE]: Google Search tool is active. If the contact mentions something unfamiliar, facts, games, news, people, or events you aren't sure about — DO NOT write 'I don't know'. SEARCH for information first, then respond in a natural human style.
ai_twin.ai_dialog_context_header: [DIALOGUE CONTEXT. Your previous replies are marked as '{me}', their messages as '{other}']. Respond ONLY as '{me}'.
ai_twin.ai_video_too_long_alert: 🚨 [NOTICE! Contact sent a video longer than 30 MINUTES ({mins} min). You cannot watch it right now. Mention you'll watch it later/in the background, but definitely react to its title and gist provided in context.]
ai_twin.ai_chat_menu_text:
🤖 AI Twin Settings for Chat {chat_id}
Here you can override digital twin behavior exclusively for this dialogue.
ai_twin.ai_g_prompt_request:
✅ AI Global Prompt Current prompt: 
{prompt}
Waiting for prompt text (or .txt file):
Defines bot behavior in all dialogues. Message will be deleted.
ai_twin.ai_c_prompt_request:
✅ AI Local Prompt Current chat prompt: 
{prompt}
Waiting for extra prompt (or .txt file):
Send 'reset' to remove local rules. Message will be deleted.
ai_twin.ai_additional_rules:
[ADDITIONAL RULES AND CONTEXT FOR THIS DIALOGUE]:
{prompt}
